rationale: Educ. Code §28.057 governs funding for a specific award/subsidy program via donations, grants, and appropriations. It does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraised values, so no direct conflict exists.
quote: The grant of any award or subsidy under the program is subject to the availability of funds.
_note: No direct or indirect textual link between §28.057 and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
